creator: flip@mailbox.org
text:
Any news on this bug?

I have exactly the same behaviour.

I am using an individual server (no server specific hardware) in my home lab, the Mellanox ConnectX3 - MCX311A-XCA - FW: 2.42.5000

PFSense 2.6 (FreeBSD 12.3) running on an ESXI 6.7 system - Mellanox Card is passed through.

It is completely random if it fails on boot or not, but sometimes it takes around 50 pfsense reboots until the system successfully boots up. But as soon as it is up, it is running perfectly fine (over weeks) without any issues.
